summary: 13 film announcements, 9 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Grace
film.announcement: Millicent Simmonds co-writes and stars in crime thriller for Inevitable Studios' first film.

film.title: Egg Baby
film.announcement: Amazon MGM acquires rom-com starring Ariana Greenblatt.

film.title: Shots! Shots! Shots!
film.announcement: Amazon MGM picks up action comedy starring Jason Momoa.

film.title: Thud
film.talent: Sarah Michelle Gellar, Rudy Pankow, Mali Elfman (director)
film.announcement: Sarah Michelle Gellar and Rudy Pankow cast as the Grim Reaper and the Devil in Mali Elfman film with Divide/Conquer and Radio Silence as executive producers.

film.title: Monsanto Drama (Untitled)
film.talent: Jonathan Bailey, Laura Dern, Lakeith Stanfield, Greg Kinnear, John Lee Hancock (director)
film.announcement: John Lee Hancock's Netflix courtroom drama on the 2018 Monsanto case adds six cast members to join Jonathan Bailey and Laura Dern.

film.title: Black Diamond
film.announcement: Comic adaptation into folk horror feature with Ernest Dickerson directing.

film.title: Corpus
film.announcement: NYC nightlife thriller boards Yellow Veil Pictures, which launches sales before Fantasia premiere.

film.title: Mickey's Home Alone
film.announcement: Disney taps into the spirit of the Macaulay Culkin classic for a Mickey's Home Alone Christmas special.

film.title: Untitled Sean Penn/Bradley Cooper Film
film.announcement: Bradley Cooper to star as a cop who ends up at Jan. 6 in Sean Penn-directed Warner Bros. film.

film.title: Narnia
film.announcement: Sony Pictures to distribute Greta Gerwig and Netflix's Narnia internationally in theaters.

film.title: Hexed
film.announcement: Disney releases first teaser for Hexed, a witch-filled animated world.

film.title: The Rocky Horror Picture Show
film.announcement: The Rocky Horror Picture Show set to screen at Sphere Las Vegas in 2027.

tv.title: The Audacity
tv.announcement: Miriam Shor joins AMC's The Audacity for Season 2.

tv.title: Count My Lies
tv.announcement: François Arnaud joins Hulu's Count My Lies.

tv.title: Dirty
tv.talent: Samantha Morton, Phoebe Dynevor, Matt Charman (creator/writer)
tv.announcement: Samantha Morton to star with Phoebe Dynevor in Matt Charman's Amazon drama series Dirty.

tv.title: The Reluctant Traveler With Eugene Levy
tv.announcement: The Reluctant Traveler With Eugene Levy renewed for Season 4 at Apple TV+.

tv.title: Heartstopper Forever
tv.announcement: Netflix releases trailer for Heartstopper Forever, the finale feature film where Nick and Charlie prepare for long distance.

tv.title: Louis C.K. Netflix Special
tv.announcement: Louis C.K.'s new Netflix special sets June release date.

tv.title: My Adventures With Superman (Green Lantern Spinoff)
tv.announcement: Auliʻi Cravalho to star as Green Lantern in My Adventures With Superman spinoff.

tv.title: The Studio
tv.announcement: The Studio Season 2 among potential titles for Venice Film Festival.
